channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2461] recovery-small test_26a: @@@@@@ FAIL: client not evicted from OST
item.description:
Commit: bb1f6e0ee5aaa7b71a2b7584fdb7fc502fd6eb37
Maloo: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/cf3fb7ac-c369-11e0-9a20-52540025f9af

I happened to notice this in an Autotest report:

== recovery-small test 26a: evict dead exports ======================================================= 01:42:25 (1312965745)
starting with 4 OST exports
fail_loc=0x505
Waiting 55 secs for update
Waiting 50 secs for update
Waiting 45 secs for update
Waiting 40 secs for update
Waiting 35 secs for update
Waiting 30 secs for update
Waiting 25 secs for update
Waiting 20 secs for update
Waiting 15 secs for update
Waiting 10 secs for update
Waiting 5 secs for update
Update not seen after 55 sec: wanted '3' got '4'
fail_loc=0x0
UUID                   1K-blocks        Used   Available Use% Mounted on
error: llapi_obd_statfs: opening '/mnt/lustre': Interrupted system call (4)
MDT0000             : Interrupted system call
error: llapi_obd_statfs: opening '/mnt/lustre': Cannot send after transport endpoint shutdown (108)
MDT0001             : Cannot send after transport endpoint shutdown

 recovery-small test_26a: @@@@@@ FAIL: client not evicted from OST 
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2011-08-09/lustre-dev-el5-x86_64__108__-7fedefc99de0/recovery-small.test_26a.*.1312965806.log
item.summary: recovery-small test_26a: @@@@@@ FAIL: client not evicted from OST

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Looks like exact duplicate of newer LU-10632.

https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/fe065d76-0baa-11e8-a7cd-52540065bddc
Another failure of this test but with bash syntax error:
Lustre 2.10.57.89

== recovery-small test 26a: evict dead exports ======================================================= 00:55:25 (1517964925)
CMD: trevis-6vm9 lctl get_param -n timeout
CMD: trevis-6vm6.trevis.hpdd.intel.com lctl set_param fail_loc=0x505
fail_loc=0x505
CMD: trevis-6vm6.trevis.hpdd.intel.com lctl set_param fail_loc=0x0
fail_loc=0x0
CMD: trevis-6vm6.trevis.hpdd.intel.com df
df: '/mnt/lustre': Cannot send after transport endpoint shutdown
Check state for lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff880039c89800
CMD: trevis-6vm6.trevis.hpdd.intel.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff880039c89800.state
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh: line 8496: ((: > 1517964926: syntax error: operand expected (error token is "> 1517964926")
Check state for lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff880039c89800
